name: accounting firms processing 10–20 intercompany transactions/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 intercompany transactions/month, manual reconciliation causes delayed financial reports. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate financial reporting due to untracked intercompany transactions.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to untracked intercompany transactions.
